SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス NanoIdGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
IdGenerator<String>
public final class NanoIdGenerator extends Object implements IdGenerator<String>
IdGenerator for Nano ID-style strings: a random, URL-safe identifier using a fixed alphabet and length, with bias-free index selection (reject masked values outside the alphabet range).

The no-argument constructor and constructors that omit a RandomGenerator use the same cryptographically strong source as UuidV7. When a generator is supplied, thread safety matches that of the given generator; if it is not thread-safe, callers must synchronize externally or confine use to one thread.

This class validates contracts on construction: non-null references with Object.requireNonNull, positive size, and alphabet rules as documented on each constructor.

Alphabets are validated: non-empty, BMP code points only (no supplementary characters or lone surrogate code units), and each code point must appear at most once. Violations produce IllegalArgumentException. Public constructors validate references with NullPointerException when null is not permitted.

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    static final @NonNull String
    DEFAULT_ALPHABET
    Default URL-safe alphabet from Nano ID (64 characters, order preserved).
    static final int
    DEFAULT_ALPHABET_SIZE
    Number of code points in DEFAULT_ALPHABET.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_SIZE
    Default string length (Nano ID default).

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    NanoIdGenerator()
    Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET, DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    NanoIdGenerator(@org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
    NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
    NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET and DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    @NonNull String
    generate()
    Generates a new Nano ID string using this generator's alphabet, length, and random source.

  • フィールド詳細

    • DEFAULT_ALPHABET

      @NonNull public static final @NonNull String DEFAULT_ALPHABET
      Default URL-safe alphabet from Nano ID (64 characters, order preserved).
      関連項目:
      • 定数フィールド値

      Number of code points in DEFAULT_ALPHABET.

      • 定数フィールド値

      Default string length (Nano ID default).

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • NanoIdGenerator

      public NanoIdGenerator()
      Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET, DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • NanoIdGenerator

      public NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET and DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      randomGenerator - source of random bytes, must not be null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • NanoIdGenerator

      public NanoIdGenerator(@Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      size - number of code points in each generated id, must be positive
      randomGenerator - source of random bytes, must not be null
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • NanoIdGenerator

      public NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
      Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP code points only, unique, non-empty; must not be null
      size - number of characters in each generated id, must be positive
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if alphabet is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if alphabet is empty, has duplicates, uses non-BMP or surrogate code points, or size is not positive
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • NanoIdGenerator

      public NanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP code points only, unique, non-empty; must not be null
      size - number of characters in each generated id, must be positive
      randomGenerator - source of random bytes, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any reference argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if alphabet is empty, has duplicates, uses non-BMP or surrogate code points, or size is not positive
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

  • メソッドの詳細

    • generate

      @NonNull public @NonNull String generate()
      Generates a new Nano ID string using this generator's alphabet, length, and random source.
      定義:
      generate インタフェース内 IdGenerator<String>
      戻り値:
      a non-null string of length size whose code points are from the configured alphabet
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
